sent_simp: 这部电影获得了观众的广泛赞誉。
sent_trad: 這部電影獲得了觀眾的廣泛讚譽。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng huòdéle guānzhòng de guǎngfàn zànyù.
english: This film received widespread praise from the audience.

sent_simp: 最近这里的房价暴涨，很多人买不起了。
sent_trad: 最近這裡的房價暴漲，很多人買不起了。
pinyin: Zuìjìn zhèlǐ de fángjià bàozhǎng, hěn duō rén mǎi bu qǐ le.
english: Housing prices here have surged recently and many people can no longer afford them.

sent_simp: 医生还没查清楚他的病因。
sent_trad: 醫生還沒查清楚他的病因。
pinyin: Yīshēng hái méi chá qīngchǔ tā de bìngyīn.
english: The doctor hasn't yet determined the cause of his illness.

sent_simp: 诚实是他做人的基本信条。
sent_trad: 誠實是他做人的基本信條。
pinyin: Chéngshí shì tā zuòrén de jīběn xìntiáo.
english: Honesty is his fundamental creed in life.

sent_simp: 他十五岁就去餐厅当学徒了。
sent_trad: 他十五歲就去餐廳當學徒了。
pinyin: Tā shíwǔ suì jiù qù cāntīng dāng xuétú le.
english: He started working as an apprentice at a restaurant at the age of fifteen.

sent_simp: 我买的是二等座，没有商务座贵。
sent_trad: 我買的是二等座，沒有商務座貴。
pinyin: Wǒ mǎi de shì èrděng zuò, méiyǒu shāngwù zuò guì.
english: I bought a second-class seat, which is not as expensive as a business class seat.

sent_simp: 他出差期间借住在朋友家里。
sent_trad: 他出差期間借住在朋友家裡。
pinyin: Tā chūchāi qījiān jièzhù zài péngyou jiālǐ.
english: He stayed at a friend's place during his business trip.

sent_simp: 政府派兵前往灾区协助救援。
sent_trad: 政府派兵前往災區協助救援。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ pàibīng qiánwǎng zāiqū xiézhù jiùyuán.
english: The government dispatched troops to the disaster area to assist with rescue efforts.

sent_simp: 他不愿意为权贵低头。
sent_trad: 他不願意為權貴低頭。
pinyin: Tā bù yuànyì wèi quánguì dītóu.
english: He is unwilling to bow his head to the powerful and privileged.

sent_simp: 他们希望在下届比赛中成功卫冕。
sent_trad: 他們希望在下屆比賽中成功衛冕。
pinyin: Tāmen xīwàng zài xià jiè bǐsài zhōng chénggōng wèimiǎn.
english: They hope to successfully defend their title in the next competition.

sent_simp: 他托父母去女方家提亲。
sent_trad: 他托父母去女方家提親。
pinyin: Tā tuō fùmǔ qù nǚfāng jiā tíqīn.
english: He asked his parents to go to the girl's family to propose marriage.

sent_simp: 表格将费用分列成几个类别。
sent_trad: 表格將費用分列成幾個類別。
pinyin: Biǎogé jiāng fèiyòng fēnliè chéng jǐ gè lèibié.
english: The table breaks down the expenses into several categories.

sent_simp: 那位市长昨晚遇刺，目前正在抢救中。
sent_trad: 那位市長昨晚遇刺，目前正在搶救中。
pinyin: Nà wèi shìzhǎng zuówǎn yùcì, mùqián zhèngzài qiǎngjiù zhōng.
english: The mayor was attacked by an assassin last night and is currently receiving emergency treatment.

sent_simp: 她的裙子下摆绣着一排小花。
sent_trad: 她的裙子下擺繡著一排小花。
pinyin: Tā de qúnzi xiàbǎi xiùzhe yī pái xiǎo huā.
english: The hem of her skirt has a row of small flowers embroidered on it.

sent_simp: 他把项目的源代码上传到了网上。
sent_trad: 他把專案的源代碼上傳到了網上。
pinyin: Tā bǎ xiàngmù de yuándàimǎ shàngghuán dào le wǎngshàng.
english: He uploaded the project's source code online.

sent_simp: 多年未见，他们叙起了旧情。
sent_trad: 多年未見，他們敘起了舊情。
pinyin: Duō nián wèi jiàn, tāmen xù qǐ le jiùqíng.
english: After many years apart, they reminisced about old times together.

sent_simp: 专家预估今年的收成会比去年好。
sent_trad: 專家預估今年的收成會比去年好。
pinyin: Zhuānjiā yùgū jīnnián de shōuchéng huì bǐ qùnián hǎo.
english: Experts forecast that this year's harvest will be better than last year's.

sent_simp: 她大学主修国际贸易专业。
sent_trad: 她大學主修國際貿易專業。
pinyin: Tā dàxué zhǔxiū guójì màoyì zhuānyè.
english: She majored in international trade at university.

sent_simp: 他花了三年时间写完这部长篇小说。
sent_trad: 他花了三年時間寫完這部長篇小說。
pinyin: Tā huāle sān nián shíjiān xiě wán zhè bù chángpiān xiǎoshuō.
english: It took him three years to finish writing this novel.

sent_simp: 你把那个图标拖到桌面上就行了。
sent_trad: 你把那個圖標拖到桌面上就行了。
pinyin: Nǐ bǎ nàge túbiāo tuō dào zhuōmiàn shàng jiù xíng le.
english: Just drag that icon onto the desktop.

sent_simp: 他靠摆摊卖小吃营生。
sent_trad: 他靠擺攤賣小吃營生。
pinyin: Tā kào bǎitān mài xiǎochī yíngshēng.
english: He earns a living by running a snack stall.

sent_simp: 周末他喜欢去山里跑越野。
sent_trad: 週末他喜歡去山裡跑越野。
pinyin: Zhōumò tā xǐhuān qù shānlǐ pǎo yuèyě.
english: On weekends he likes to go trail running in the mountains.

sent_simp: 这条线段的两个端点坐标是多少？
sent_trad: 這條線段的兩個端點坐標是多少？
pinyin: Zhè tiáo xiànduàn de liǎng gè duāndiǎn zuòbiāo shì duōshao?
english: What are the coordinates of the two endpoints of this line segment?

sent_simp: 这款蓝牙耳机和手机配对很简单。
sent_trad: 這款藍牙耳機和手機配對很簡單。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn lányá ěrjī hé shǒujī pèiduì hěn jiǎndān.
english: Pairing these Bluetooth earphones with a phone is very simple.

sent_simp: 她买了一个新鲜菠萝回来。
sent_trad: 她買了一個新鮮菠蘿回來。
pinyin: Tā mǎile yī gè xīnxiān bōluó huílái.
english: She bought a fresh pineapple.

sent_simp: 那艘巡洋舰正在执行巡逻任务。
sent_trad: 那艘巡洋艦正在執行巡邏任務。
pinyin: Nà sōu xúnyángjiàn zhèngzài zhíxíng xúnluó rènwù.
english: That cruiser is currently carrying out a patrol mission.

sent_simp: 实验室里摆满了各种试管。
sent_trad: 實驗室裡擺滿了各種試管。
pinyin: Shíyànshì lǐ bǎi mǎnle gè zhǒng shìguǎn.
english: The laboratory is filled with all kinds of test tubes.

sent_simp: 这个电路需要加一个电感来滤波。
sent_trad: 這個電路需要加一個電感來濾波。
pinyin: Zhège diànlù xūyào jiā yī gè diàngǎn lái lǜbō.
english: This circuit needs an inductor added to filter the signal.

sent_simp: 他在大学选修了密码学课程。
sent_trad: 他在大學選修了密碼學課程。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué xuǎnxiūle mìmǎxué kèchéng.
english: He took a cryptography course as an elective at university.

sent_simp: 手机内存不够了，先卸载几个不常用的软件吧。
sent_trad: 手機記憶體不夠了，先卸載幾個不常用的軟體吧。

english: The phone storage is running low; let's first uninstall a few rarely-used apps.

sent_simp: 海边种了一排高大的棕榈树。
sent_trad: 海邊種了一排高大的棕櫚樹。
pinyin: Hǎibiān zhòngle yī pái gāodà de zōnglǘ shù.
english: A row of tall palm trees were planted along the seaside.

sent_simp: 我姑妈每年春节都会来我们家。
sent_trad: 我姑媽每年春節都會來我們家。
pinyin: Wǒ gūmā měi nián chūnjié dōu huì lái wǒmen jiā.
english: My paternal aunt comes to our house every Lunar New Year.

sent_simp: 两条河流在此处交合，形成一片湿地。
sent_trad: 兩條河流在此處交合，形成一片濕地。
pinyin: Liǎng tiáo héliú zài cǐchù jiāohé, xíngchéng yī piàn shīdì.
english: Two rivers meet here, forming a wetland area.

sent_simp: 工厂将利润用于再生产，扩大规模。
sent_trad: 工廠將利潤用於再生產，擴大規模。
pinyin: Gōngchǎng jiāng lìrùn yòng yú zàishēngchǎn, kuòdà guīmó.
english: The factory uses its profits for reproduction to expand its scale.

sent_simp: 这个网络图中有十个结点。
sent_trad: 這個網路圖中有十個結點。
pinyin: Zhège wǎngluò tú zhōng yǒu shí gè jiédiǎn.
english: There are ten nodes in this network diagram.

sent_simp: 双眼视差让我们能感知物体的深度。
sent_trad: 雙眼視差讓我們能感知物體的深度。
pinyin: Shuāngyǎn shìchā ràng wǒmen néng gǎnzhī wùtǐ de shēndù.
english: Binocular parallax allows us to perceive the depth of objects.

sent_simp: 写对话时别忘了加引号。
sent_trad: 寫對話時別忘了加引號。
pinyin: Xiě duìhuà shí bié wàngle jiā yǐnhào.
english: Don't forget to add quotation marks when writing dialogue.

sent_simp: 这个国家的外债总额已经很高了。
sent_trad: 這個國家的外債總額已經很高了。
pinyin: Zhège guójiā de wàizhài zǒng'é yǐjīng hěn gāo le.
english: This country's total foreign debt is already very high.

sent_simp: 他通过买卖期权获利不少。
sent_trad: 他通過買賣期權獲利不少。
pinyin: Tā tōngguò mǎimài qīquán huòlì bù shǎo.
english: He made quite a profit by trading options.

sent_simp: 很多年轻人选择住在城市周边的卫星城。
sent_trad: 很多年輕人選擇住在城市周邊的衛星城。
